Sport|Olympics

As the2024 Summer Olympic Gamesare coming to an end, photographers have worked tirelessly to capture the most iconic moments throughout the event.

From North and South Korean athletes posing up for a selfie together after their table tennis showdown-toTeam GB’s Tom Daleygetting a victory kiss from Noah Williamson-to the photograph dubbed as the most iconic of the Summer Olympics-to Diana, the widow of the late Olympic weightlifter Oleksandr Pielieshenko, who was killed fighting against Russia's invasion, the multi-sport event has created many happy and sad moments.

The Evening Standard has compiled twenty best photographs from the 2024Paris Olympics:

Paris 2024: Tom Daley delivers super silver with Noah Williams after delaying Olympic farewell

Team GB reach 50-medal mark at Paris Olympics as Ellie Aldridge delivers 13th gold in kitesurfing

Italian boxer 'never felt punch like this' as she quit Olympic bout against athlete who failed 'gender test'

Today's Olympics schedule: Team GB events, Day 14 medal highlights and how to watch the Paris Games

This selection of pictures is edited by the Evening Standard's picture editorsElliot WaglandandDebasish Sarmah.
